name: db-slide-finder
description: A fast, offline, in-browser search engine + PDF viewer over the combined lecture slides (317 slides, VL1–VL7). Paste a database question and the most relevant slides are ranked **live as you type** (no Enter, no server round-trip). Click a result to open that slide with the matching terms highlighted.

scripts.test: node tests/engine.test.js && node tests/llm-config.test.js && node tests/client-provider.test.js && node tests/sql-util.test.js && node tests/server.test.js
